query:
INSERT INTO permission_role_templates (name, description, canManageUsers, canBulkUploadUsers, canEditContent, canManageProperties, canReviewKYC, canApproveInvestments, canManageTransactions, canViewFinancials, canAccessCRM, canViewAnalytics, canManageSettings, isSystem) VALUES
('Content Manager', 'Manages platform content and property listings', FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, TRUE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, TRUE),
('KYC Reviewer', 'Reviews and approves KYC submissions', FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, TRUE),
('Financial Admin', 'Manages transactions and financial operations', FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, FALSE, TRUE, FALSE, TRUE),
('CRM Manager', 'Accesses CRM and analytics dashboards', FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, TRUE, TRUE, FALSE, TRUE),
('User Manager', 'Manages users and bulk imports', TRUE, TRUE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE, TRUE),
('Full Admin', 'Has all permissions except system settings', TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, TRUE, FALSE, TRUE)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE description=VALUES(description);
